name: Grilled Chicken Adobo
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients for the achiote sauce base in a bowl.
2. Place 10 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves (about 3 1/2 lbs) in the marinade and turn off the heat.
3. Mix well to coat the chicken evenly.
4. Let the marinated chicken rest at room temperature for at least 30 minutes before grilling.
5. Grill the chicken over medium heat until fully cooked, about 6-8 minutes per side.
6. Serve hot with rice or your choice of side dish.
